issues.detail: The skill file focuses on happy path and does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: setup-snowflake-project
scenarios.rationale: Both responses miss the required host and port fields in profiles.yml, but Response B includes the cd command and a more complete snippet, earning it a higher score.

scenarios.name: create-incremental-model-with-macro
scenarios.rationale: Response B satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A fails to alias the macro output as amount_dollars.
